author: kclowes
content: PSA - I opened [an issue](https://github.com/ethereum/pm/issues/2075) for next call.  The OpenRPC grant is wrapping up, so I'd like to get the PRs listed in the agenda merged after the call. The PRs have the new linter in, and tag and versioning support. I think <@489914064919855114> has demoed them already, but wanted to flag in case anyone wants to look at the code before it goes in. cc/ <@372731338031366165> <@194432762315407360> <@962726279336046633>
